description: Call GET /api/kuaishou/search-video/v2 for Kuaishou Video Search through JustOneAPI with keyword.

operations.description: Get Kuaishou video Search data, including video ID, cover image, and description, for competitive analysis and market trends and keywords monitoring and brand tracking.

parameters.description: Access token for this API service.
parameters.name: token

parameters.description: The search keyword to find videos.
parameters.name: keyword

parameters.description: Page number for results, starting from 1.
parameters.name: page
